stories.title: Sinner's Historic Streak on the Line vs Popyrin (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Sinner has won 29 straight Masters 1000 matches — tied with Federer for 3rd all-time.

No. 30 is on the line today vs Popyrin in Rome R3.

The Career Golden Masters quest continues. 🎾

#tennis #ItalianOpen #Sinner

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Rome is the one Masters 1000 title Sinner has never won.

He has all 8 others.

Today vs Popyrin is his shot toward the Career Golden Masters. 🏆 #tennis #ItalianOpen

article.headline: Sinner's 30th Consecutive Masters Win on the Line — Rome R3 vs Popyrin

stories.title: Swiatek vs Osaka — Rome's Marquee Rematch (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Swiatek vs Osaka — Rome R16, today.

They last met at Roland Garros 2024. Swiatek saved a match point to survive 7-6, 1-6, 7-5.

Now Osaka wants her answer. With Sabalenka out injured, the winner steps into a wide-open draw. #tennis #ItalianOpen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Swiatek's new coach Roig tore his Achilles courtside Sunday — and she still cruised 6-1, 6-0.

Today she faces Osaka in the Rome R16.

The composure is real. #tennis #WTA

article.headline: Swiatek vs Osaka: Rome's Blockbuster Rematch Carries French Open Weight

stories.title: WTA R16 — All-American Showdown Gauff vs Jovic (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
WTA Rome today:

🇺🇸 Gauff (No. 3) vs Jovic (No. 16) — defending RG champ vs 19yo rising star
🎾 Andreeva vs Mertens — 13 clay wins vs the woman who ended Paolini's reign

No. 1 Sabalenka is gone. This draw is wide open. #tennis #ItalianOpen

article.headline: WTA Rome R16: Gauff vs Jovic Leads a Chaotic, Wide-Open Draw

stories.title: ATP R3 Roundup — Cobolli, Tiafoe, Nakashima, Rublev Advance (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Rome ATP R3 results:

✅ Cobolli d. Tirante 7-6(1), 6-3 (Italy delivers for the crowd)
✅ Nakashima d. Basilashvili 6-4, 6-0
✅ Tiafoe d. Pellegrino 6-7(5), 6-3, 6-2
✅ Rublev 6-4, 6-4
✅ Navone d. Auger-Aliassime 7-6(4), 7-6(5)

Medvedev vs Llamas Ruiz tonight. #tennis

stories.title: Cirstea's Cinderella Run — Giant-Killer Next Faces Noskova (TIER 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Sorana Cirstea is 36, playing her final season, and just beat the world No. 1 for the first time in her career.

Today she faces No. 9 seed Noskova in the Rome R16.

The Cinderella run is not done yet. #tennis #ItalianOpen

article.headline: Cirstea's Farewell Season Has a New Chapter: The Rome R16
